chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1734 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.1 & 2 2. For hearing of CMA No.8618/2025 3. For hearing of main case 09.05.2025 Messrs. Muhammad Asad Ashfaq Tola and Muhammad Amayed Ashfaq Tola, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh advocate undertakes to file Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent. Statement filed on behalf of respondent No.3 is taken on record. Statement is accompanied by a letter which reads as follows: “Subject: INFORMATION REQUIRED UNDER SECTION 26 OF THE CUSTOMS ACT, 1969 Please refer to this Collectorate letter of even number dated 14.11.2024 on the subject cited above. 2. It is informed that as per Court orders dated 17.11.2023 and 20.12.2023, the 50% of the recovery and penalty amount has been deposited before the Nazir of Sindh High Court by M/s. Hascombe Business Solutions (Pvt.) Ltd., which is now merged in M/s Clover Pakistan Limited. In this regard as per Court order no coercive action shall be taken against the above mentioned company. The bank account of David Cyrus Paul (Country Head Manager of M/s. Hascombe Business Solutions (Pvt. Ltd) may be defreeze.” In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
